title: Stablecoin Firm Raises $222M, Challenging Ethereum's Dominance
summary: A stablecoin company raised $222M, aiming to reduce Ethereum's importance as crypto aligns with institutions.
charlotte_impact: Highlights growing competition in the stablecoin market and potential shifts in blockchain dominance.

title: K-Shaped Economy Persists Due to Inflation and Other Factors
summary: Research indicates the US economy remains K-shaped, driven by factors including the impact of inflation.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the uneven economic recovery, with some sectors and individuals benefiting more than others.

title: Circle CEO: Stablecoin Freezes Require Court Order
summary: Circle will only freeze its stablecoin with a court order or law enforcement direction, according to the CEO.

title: Economist Predicts Recession and 30% Stock Market Plunge

title: China Court Rules AI-Related Layoffs Illegal

title: OpenClaw's Rise in China's AI Agent Economy
